name: Cream Puff Heart
recipeIngredient: 1 package cook and serve vanilla pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan over medium heat, bring water and butter to a boil.
2. Add flour and salt all at once; stir until a smooth ball forms.
3. Remove from heat; let stand 5 minutes.
4. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition. Beat until smooth.
5. Cover a baking sheet with foil; grease foil.
6. Trace a 12-inch heart onto foil.
7. Drop batter by rounded tablespoonfuls along the outside of the heart (mound should be almost touching).
8. Bake at 400 degrees for 40-45 minutes or until golden.
9. Lift foil and transfer to a wire rack.
10. Immediately cut a slit in each puff to allow steam to escape; cool.
11. In a saucepan, cook pudding mix and milk according to package directions.
12. Cool.
13. Fold in cream and vanilla.
14. Place cream puffs on a serving plate; split puffs and remove soft dough from inside.
15. Spoon filling into puffs; add strawberries.
16. Replace tops; dust with confectioner's sugar. Chill until serving.
